mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS payMethodId, a.recharge_way_i18 AS rechargeWayI18 FROM system_recharge_way a

SELECT site.recharge_way_id rechargeWayId, site.site_code siteCode, site.way_fee wayFee, site.way_fee_fixed_amount wayFeeFixedAmount, way.currency_code currencyCode, m.message as rechargeWayName FROM site_recharge_way site left join system_recharge_way way on way.id = site.recharge_way_id left join i18n_message m on way.recharge_way_i18 = m.message_key and m.`language` ='zh-CN' WHERE site.site_code = #{siteCode}
